creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Unfortunately text code of patch file is collapsed on sent-pr mail.
Please remove adding part of the russian/gimp-help/files/patch-glossary.po
from "gimp-help-2.8-update.shar", and replace russian/gimp-help/Makefile
with the attached file, that does the same fix by a sed-script.
